'''âs-z-w''' ('''sazawa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bebar|bebar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-z-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bebar|bebar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-z-w
|-
! Lemma
| sazawa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sazawithi|sazawithi]] || [[word:sazawiji|sazawiji]] || [[word:sazawishi|sazawishi]] || [[word:sazawi|sazawi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sazawuthuth|sazawuthuth]] || [[word:sazawujuj|sazawujuj]] || [[word:sazawushush|sazawushush]] || [[word:sazaw|sazaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sazawuthu|sazawuthu]] || [[word:sazawuju|sazawuju]] || [[word:sazawushu|sazawushu]] || [[word:sazawu|sazawu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sazawufuth|sazawufuth]] || [[word:sazawufuj|sazawufuj]] || [[word:sazawufush|sazawufush]] || [[word:sazawuf|sazawuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sazawethe|sazawethe]] || [[word:sazaweje|sazaweje]] || [[word:sazaweshe|sazaweshe]] || [[word:sazawe|sazawe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sazawothoth|sazawothoth]] || [[word:sazawojoj|sazawojoj]] || [[word:sazawoshosh|sazawoshosh]] || [[word:sazaw|sazaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sazawotho|sazawotho]] || [[word:sazawojo|sazawojo]] || [[word:sazawosho|sazawosho]] || [[word:sazawo|sazawo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sazawofoth|sazawofoth]] || [[word:sazawofoj|sazawofoj]] || [[word:sazawofosh|sazawofosh]] || [[word:sazawof|sazawof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sazawĂŠthĂŠ|sazawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:sazawĂŠjĂŠ|sazawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:sazawĂŠshĂŠ|sazawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:sazawĂŠ|sazawĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sazawathath|sazawathath]] || [[word:sazawajaj|sazawajaj]] || [[word:sazawashash|sazawashash]] || [[word:sazaw|sazaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sazawatha|sazawatha]] || [[word:sazawaja|sazawaja]] || [[word:sazawasha|sazawasha]] || [[word:sazawa|sazawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sazawafath|sazawafath]] || [[word:sazawafaj|sazawafaj]] || [[word:sazawafash|sazawafash]] || [[word:sazawaf|sazawaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sazawasha|sazawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosazawasha|gosazawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisazawasha|gokisazawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sazawnĂŒsha|sazawnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosazawnknĂŒsha|gosazawnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisazawnĂŒsha|gokisazawnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sazawshĂ«sha|sazawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosazawnkshĂ«sha|gosazawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisazawshĂ«sha|gokisazawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sazawrosha|sazawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosazawnkrosha|gosazawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisazawrosha|gokisazawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sazawmusha|sazawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosazawnkmusha|gosazawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisazawmusha|gokisazawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sazawsherasha|sazawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosazawnksherasha|gosazawnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisazawsherasha|gokisazawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sazawngasha|sazawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosazawnkngasha|gosazawnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisazawngasha|gokisazawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sazawyasha|sazawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosazawnkyasha|gosazawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisazawyasha|gokisazawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sazawyamasha|sazawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosazawnkyamasha|gosazawnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisazawyamasha|gokisazawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sazawnĂŒshĂ«sha|sazawnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosazawnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gosazawnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisazawnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokisazawnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sazawnĂŒrosha|sazawnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosazawnknĂŒrosha|gosazawnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisazawnĂŒrosha|gokisazawnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sazawnĂŒmusha|sazawnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosazawnknĂŒmusha|gosazawnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisazawnĂŒmusha|gokisazawnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sazawshĂ«nĂŒsha|sazawshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosazawnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gosazawnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisazawshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokisazawshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sazawshĂ«rosha|sazawshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosazawnkshĂ«rosha|gosazawnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisazawshĂ«rosha|gokisazawshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sazawshĂ«musha|sazawshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosazawnkshĂ«musha|gosazawnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisazawshĂ«musha|gokisazawshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sazawronĂŒsha|sazawronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosazawnkronĂŒsha|gosazawnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisazawronĂŒsha|gokisazawronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sazawroshĂ«sha|sazawroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosazawnkroshĂ«sha|gosazawnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisazawroshĂ«sha|gokisazawroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sazawromusha|sazawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosazawnkromusha|gosazawnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisazawromusha|gokisazawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sazawmunĂŒsha|sazawmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosazawnkmunĂŒsha|gosazawnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisazawmunĂŒsha|gokisazawmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sazawmushĂ«sha|sazawmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosazawnkmushĂ«sha|gosazawnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisazawmushĂ«sha|gokisazawmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sazawmurosha|sazawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosazawnkmurosha|gosazawnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisazawmurosha|gokisazawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sazaw|sazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sĂŠzĂŠw|sĂŠzĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosazaw|hosazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosĂŠzĂŠw|hosĂŠzĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosazaw|hohosazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosĂŠzĂŠw|hohosĂŠzĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒsazaw|nĂŒsazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒsĂŠzĂŠw|nĂŒsĂŠzĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsazaw|nĂŒnĂŒsazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠzĂŠw|nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠzĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻsazaw|nĂŻsazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻsĂŠzĂŠw|nĂŻsĂŠzĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsazaw|nĂŻnĂŻsazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠzĂŠw|nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠzĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusazaw|lusazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lusĂŠzĂŠw|lusĂŠzĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusazaw|lulusazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusĂŠzĂŠw|lulusĂŠzĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisazaw|lisazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lisĂŠzĂŠw|lisĂŠzĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisazaw|lilisazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisĂŠzĂŠw|lilisĂŠzĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosazaw|kosazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosĂŠzĂŠw|kosĂŠzĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosazaw|kokosazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosĂŠzĂŠw|kokosĂŠzĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesazaw|kesazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesĂŠzĂŠw|kesĂŠzĂŠw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesazaw|kekesazaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesĂŠzĂŠw|kekesĂŠzĂŠw]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
